ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance log */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the specific operation */,
  "dbms_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the DBMS used */,
  "schema_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the schema involved */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operator performing the operation */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of the operation (e.g., DUPLICATE, NORMAL) */,
  "killed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the operation was killed */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Execution time of the operation in milliseconds */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the operation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the operation */,
  "query" TEXT /* SQL query or operation executed */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the operation failed */,
  "resource_usage" TEXT /* JSON object containing resource usage data (e.g., CPU, memory) */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* JSON object containing additional performance metrics (e.g., I/O operations, network latency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_logs_killed FOREIGN KEY ("killed") REFERENCES operation_status ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_logs_dbms_id FOREIGN KEY ("dbms_id") REFERENCES dbms ("dbms_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_logs_operation_type FOREIGN KEY ("operation_type") REFERENCES operation_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_logs_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_logs_schema_id FOREIGN KEY ("schema_id") REFERENCES schemas ("schema_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dbms" (
  "dbms_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DBMS */,
  "dbms_name" TEXT /* Name of the DBMS (e.g., SQLite, PostgreSQL) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the DBMS */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the DBMS */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the DBMS was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dbms_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schemas" (
  "schema_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schema */,
  "schema_name" TEXT /* Name of the schema */,
  "dbms_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the DBMS the schema belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the schema */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the schema was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the schema was last updated */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the schema in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schema_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schemas_dbms_id FOREIGN KEY ("dbms_id") REFERENCES dbms ("dbms_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the operator was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the operator was last updated */,
  "operator_type" TEXT /* Type of the operator (e.g., DDL, DML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation type (e.g., DUPLICATE, NORMAL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation status (e.g., KILLED, SUCCESSFUL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the client account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the client account was last updated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the client */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the client (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "databases" (
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client owning the database */,
  "dbms_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the DBMS used for the database */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the database was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the database was last updated */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the database in bytes */,
  "last_backup_date" TEXT /* Date of the last database backup */,
  "backup_frequency" TEXT /* Backup frequency (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_databases_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_databases_dbms_id FOREIGN KEY ("dbms_id") REFERENCES dbms ("dbms_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, analyst) */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance log being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the log */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the log was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the log */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES performance_logs ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance log */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., performance issue, error) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES performance_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON object containing the report data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
